heading: Structured Vendor Management for High-Stakes Procurement
subheading: A centralised digital platform designed to streamline vendor registration, pre-qualification and supplier management — built for organisations that demand transparency, accuracy and control.
aboutHeading: Replacing Spreadsheets with a System Built for Serious Procurement
quote: From vendor registration to performance tracking — complete supplier management designed for organisations that can't afford gaps in their procurement process.
contentone: When Sri Lanka Cricket needed to bring structure, transparency and control to its supplier and service provider network, ThinkCube delivered a purpose-built Vendor Management System that replaced manual and spreadsheet-based coordination with a single, centralised digital platform.
contenttwo: The system enables structured vendor registration and pre-qualification, management of vendor profiles and compliance documentation, categorisation by procurement type, performance tracking, and an annual registration cycle — all managed through one administrative interface.
contentthree: Designed to support high-value procurement across international and domestic cricket events, the platform gives procurement teams clear visibility over their entire vendor database — from first registration to ongoing performance. With verified supplier records, consistent compliance documentation and transparent procurement categories, the ThinkCube Vendor Management System transforms vendor coordination from an operational burden into a strategic advantage.

heading: Accreditation Management Made Simple
subheading: A smart, end-to-end accreditation system designed to manage access, credentials and approvals seamlessly across events of every scale.
aboutHeading: The Smarter Way to Manage Event Accreditation
quote: From vendor registration to card printing — complete accreditation control in one powerful platform.
contentone: Managing accreditation at events is one of the most complex logistical challenges organisers face. Accredify was built by ThinkCube to eliminate that complexity — giving event organisers full control over who gets access, where they can go, and how their credentials are managed from start to finish.
contenttwo: Accredify allows organisers to create separate access types and zones, handle accreditation vendor by vendor, and run a structured user-wise approval process — ensuring the right people are in the right places at all times.
contentthree: From generating and printing PVC and paper accreditation cards to validating credentials at entry points in real time, Accredify covers the entire accreditation lifecycle. Whether you're managing a small corporate conference or a large-scale national event, Accredify delivers the structure, security and efficiency your event demands.

heading: Seamless Vehicle Access Management for Every Event
subheading: A dedicated vehicle pass system that puts secure, contactless access control in the hands of your event operations team.
aboutHeading: Taking Vehicle Access Control to the Next Level
quote: From pass generation to validation — complete vehicle access management built for events of any scale.
contentone: Managing vehicle movement at events is a critical security and logistics challenge that is often overlooked until it becomes a problem. Accredify Vehicle Pass was built by ThinkCube to give event organisers a dedicated, reliable system for controlling and validating vehicle access across all zones and entry points.
contenttwo: Accredify Vehicle Pass allows organisers to create separate access types and zones for vehicles, share passes instantly via URL, and validate them at entry points in real time — removing the need for physical paperwork or manual checks entirely.
contentthree: Whether it's managing media vehicles, vendor deliveries, VIP transport or staff parking, Accredify Vehicle Pass gives your team complete visibility and control over every vehicle on site. Simple to issue, easy to share and instant to validate — it's vehicle access management built for the pace of live events.

heading: E-Learning Built for the Modern Workplace
subheading: A powerful corporate e-learning platform designed to structure, deliver and track learning across your entire organisation — from onboarding to upskilling.
aboutHeading: Learning That Moves at the Speed of Your Business
quote: From lesson design to progress tracking — a complete digital learning environment built around the way your organisation works.
contentone: In today's fast-moving business environment, organisations that invest in continuous learning outperform those that don't. LeapX was built by ThinkCube to give companies a structured, scalable platform for delivering learning that is organised around their unique hierarchy, culture and goals.
contenttwo: LeapX allows organisations to design their company hierarchy, upload and organise study materials, assign lessons to the right people, and track progress across every level of the business — all from one centralised platform.
contentthree: Whether you're onboarding new employees, rolling out compliance training or building a culture of continuous development, LeapX gives learning managers the tools to deliver structured programmes and measure their impact in real time. Purpose-built for corporates, LeapX turns learning from an afterthought into a competitive advantage.

heading: End-to-End Ticketing for Live Events
subheading: A complete ticketing platform built to manage online and terminal sales, manifest creation and real-time ticket validation — all in one place.
aboutHeading: The Complete Ticketing Solution for Events That Can't Afford to Get It Wrong
quote: From manifest to gate — a fully integrated ticketing platform built for the pace and pressure of live events.
contentone: Selling tickets is only one part of running a successful event. Managing manifests, coordinating multiple terminal sales points, and validating tickets at the gate in real time — that's where most systems fall short. The SLC Ticketing System was built by ThinkCube to handle the full ticketing lifecycle, from the first sale to the last entry.
contenttwo: The platform allows organisers to create a complete event manifest, manage online ticketing alongside terminal-wise ticket sales, and validate tickets instantly at entry points — giving operations teams full visibility and control at every stage.
contentthree: Whether you're managing a cricket match, a concert or a large-scale national event, the SLC Ticketing System is built to handle high volumes, multiple sales channels and real-time validation without missing a beat. Reliable, scalable and purpose-built for live events — it's ticketing infrastructure you can trust when it matters most.

heading: Bringing Government Services to Every Citizen's Doorstep
subheading: A digital citizen portal that transforms the traditional Grama Niladari office experience into a seamless, accessible and paperless service.
aboutHeading: Digitising the Heart of Sri Lanka's Grassroots Government
quote: Empowering citizens and Grama Niladari officers alike — bringing essential public services into the digital age.
contentone: The Grama Niladari office is the most important point of contact between Sri Lanka's government and its citizens — handling everything from residency certificates to civil documentation at the community level. E-Grama Niladari (EGN) was built by ThinkCube to bring that critical service infrastructure into the digital era, making it faster, more transparent and more accessible for every citizen.
contenttwo: EGN digitises the end-to-end citizen service process — enabling residents to submit requests, track application status and receive approvals through a streamlined online portal, while giving Grama Niladari officers the tools to manage, process and fulfil requests efficiently and accurately.
contentthree: By eliminating manual paperwork, reducing office queues and creating a transparent digital record of every transaction, EGN not only improves the citizen experience but also empowers government officers to serve their communities more effectively. A smarter Grama Niladari office — for a smarter Sri Lanka.

heading: Comprehensive Digital Management for Modern Healthcare
subheading: A fully integrated Hospital Information Management System designed to streamline every aspect of hospital operations — from patient registration to pharmacy management.
aboutHeading: Putting Patients First Through Smarter Hospital Management
quote: From registration to discharge — a complete digital ecosystem built for the complexities of modern healthcare.
contentone: Running a hospital demands precision, coordination and real-time information across every department simultaneously. The ThinkCube Hospital Information Management System was built to give healthcare facilities a single, fully integrated platform that connects every touchpoint of the patient journey — from the front desk to the pharmacy, from the laboratory to the billing office.
contenttwo: HMS covers patient registration and profile management, doctor and staff management, lab and diagnostic management, pharmacy management, billing and invoicing, and inventory and asset management — giving hospital administrators complete operational visibility in real time.
contentthree: Whether you're managing a busy outpatient department, coordinating lab results with ward teams, or ensuring pharmacy stock levels are always accurate, HMS eliminates the inefficiencies of disconnected systems and manual processes. Built specifically for Sri Lankan hospitals and healthcare providers, it's a platform designed not just to manage operations — but to ultimately deliver better outcomes for every patient you serve.

heading: Real-Time Match Capturing for the Modern Game
subheading: A cutting-edge live match capturing platform built to record, track and analyse cricket performance with precision — ball by ball, moment by moment.
aboutHeading: Bringing Professional Match Analysis to Every Level of the Game
quote: From live capture to performance analysis — giving teams, coaches and broadcasters the data they need to make every moment count.
contentone: In modern cricket, the margin between winning and losing is often decided by the quality of data available to coaches, analysts and players. LiveMatch was built by ThinkCube to bring professional-grade match capturing and performance analysis technology to cricket at every level — from domestic tournaments to international fixtures.
contenttwo: LiveMatch delivers live video capture, real-time player tracking, time-stamped data recording, detailed performance analysis, and video replay with slow motion analysis — giving teams and analysts a complete, frame-by-frame picture of every match.
contentthree: Whether you're a coaching team looking to break down opposition tactics, a broadcaster seeking richer match coverage, or a cricket board building a long-term performance database, LiveMatch delivers the tools to capture, analyse and act on match data like never before. Built for the pace, complexity and passion of cricket — it's match intelligence for the teams that refuse to leave anything to chance.

heading: Enterprise Resource Planning for Growing Businesses
subheading: A comprehensive cloud-based ERP solution designed to streamline operations, manage inventory, and drive growth for small and medium enterprises.
aboutHeading: Smart ERP Built for the Way You Do Business
quote: Empowering MSMEs with an all-in-one business management platform that simplifies operations from purchase to payment.
contentone: At ThinkCube, we built eZbiz for the businesses that keep economies moving — the pharmacies, hardware stores, mini marts and mobile shops that need powerful tools without the complexity of enterprise-level systems.
contenttwo: eZbiz brings together purchasing, inventory, sales, accounting, CRM and point-of-sale into a single, seamlessly connected platform — so every part of your business works together, not in silos.
contentthree: From managing batch and serial inventory items to tracking customer relationships and generating financial reports, eZbiz gives business owners complete visibility and control over their operations. Whether you're running a single outlet or managing multiple locations, eZbiz scales with you — handling everything from buy and sell transactions to limited production workflows and service management, all from one place.
